top_signals.title: China imposes trade curbs on dozens of U.S. firms in retaliation for Pentagon blacklist
top_signals.summary: The Pentagon earlier this month updated its so-called 1260H list by adding a slew of Chinese technology companies to a roster of entities it believes have aided Beijing's military.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Here are 3 big things to watch in the stock market this coming week
top_signals.summary: FedEx reports earnings, and the Fed's preferred inflation gauge is due out.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Olympian Eileen GU on Her Motivations for Success
top_signals.summary: Olympic gold medalist Eileen Gu sits down exclusively with Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin to talk about her recent achievements, personal motivations and how she views her brand partnerships. The freestyle skier also shared why she prefers Peking Duck over Dim Sum, as well as why her favorite place is somewhere that is close to home. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: New Prinz Eugen ransomware prioritizes recent files for encryption
top_signals.summary: A new ransomware operation named 'Prinz Eugen' prioritizes recently modified files for encryption and leaves no ransom note on the system. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ‘We’re here to win’: Nike CEO on the race to revive the biggest brand in sport
top_signals.summary: Elliott Hill says scale of problems means restructuring is taking longer than hoped
